reviews.comment: I recently visited this coffee shop and had an amazing experience. The coffee was perfectly made, rich in flavor, and served at just the right temperature. The staff were friendly, attentive,specially  udit and anand feel welcome from the moment I walked in. The ambiance is cozy and stylish, making it a great spot to relax or work. Highly recommend

reviewReply.comment: We’re so glad you had an amazing experience! It’s wonderful to hear you loved the coffee, the cozy vibe, and our warm hospitality. We can’t wait to welcome you back! ☕

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xKV1NscHBaRWh5UW1adVZFRjVkVXhUVG5sdlpYYxAB

reviews.comment: Coffee Island is a wonderful place to relax and enjoy a great cup of coffee. The ambience is warm, inviting, and thoughtfully designed — perfect whether you want to work, read, or simply unwind. What really stands out is the coffee culture here; it’s not just about serving coffee but creating an experience. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate, specially SURBHI & YASMIN and every cup reflects quality and care. Definitely a place I’d recommend to all coffee lovers!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the ambience and the coffee culture we strive to create. Every cup is made with care, and it’s great to know that it made your visit special. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another relaxing coffee moment!

reviews.comment:
Items in the menu are limited, food is decent.
It is very neat and clean, good ambience and lighting. Nice place to have coffee and hang out with friends.

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the ambience, cleanliness, and the vibe of our cafe. Your note on the menu variety has been taken into account, and our team is already exploring ways to expand the options while keeping the experience fresh and enjoyable. We look forward to welcoming you back for coffee and good times with friends.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pOelFtWkRNRzh4VG01U1pIbExlalJ2UWpVNE1HYxAB

reviews.comment: It's the worst place in GK2. Food was AWFULLY BAD and over the top pricing. Their Pasta had no salt, no olive oil, just bouled noodles in some awful vegetable oil. The Croissants had no accompaniment like jam or anything. The tea was cold. Their chicken puff was stale. And of course in a Saturday evening it was empty while all other places were booked full. Massively OVER PRICED for such bad food. NEVER EVER visit this place.

reviewReply.comment: We hear you, Arundhati. Your points on food quality and value have been noted, and our team has already begun reviewing these areas. Guest feedback like yours helps us strengthen our menu and experience, and we’d be glad to welcome you back once these improvements are live.

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/13380444637775966918/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21oMVgwdzFabFkxVkc1YVpHVnlVVkZPZHpSTE4xRRAB

reviews.comment:
We ordered tea, spaghetti, open chicken puffs and butter croisant. Tea was cold. Spaghetti had no salt. Neither did chicken puffs. Butter croissant came without butter (and no marmalade/jam/compote) - basically one dry croissant hard to swallow.

Disappointment, to say the least. No wonder it remains empty most of the time, in a market where finding a seat is difficult on a Saturday evening.

reviewReply.comment: Shrabani, thank you for being upfront about your experience. The details you’ve mentioned are under review with our kitchen team so that such gaps don’t repeat. We’re committed to building a better dining experience, and we’d love for you to notice the difference on your next visit.

reviews.comment: Vibrant and beautiful, community coffee club environment. Very happy to go staff and service. Amazing coffee and tasty, complimenting food... It's very different from any regular coffee cafes... A must try..
